programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome
programme.desc: The family of Kenia Monge share the agonizing details of what happened around the beautiful 19-year-old's disappearance; her father, sister and authorities explain how the texts in Kenia's cell phone were the impetus to finding her abductor.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome
programme.desc: Those closest to Madison Nygard share the agonizing details around the beautiful 16-year-old's terrifying abduction as she walked home from a party; her mother, friends and authorities explain how Madison's attack would ultimately uncover clues.

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: Natural Blood Pressure Management
programme.desc: Cardiologist Dr. Ernst von Schwarz, M.D. shows how to manage your blood pressure naturally and help protect your heart for life with My Best Heart.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: I Survived
programme.desc: A mother is jammed into a snow-filled garbage can by her ex-husband; a woman struggles to escape a pile of bodies after an elevator malfunction; three men attack a bar owner as part of a gang initiation.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: I Survived
programme.desc: A store manager and his staff are shot by two killers; a young man has both his arms torn off in an accident; a young girl is kidnapped by a serial killer.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: I Survived
programme.desc: Two women fight for their lives when an attacker ambushes them on a mountain trail; two men survive 14 hours adrift at sea.

programme.title: I Survived
programme.desc: A man is taken hostage by Marxist rebels; two girls are abducted while walking home from school.

programme.title: Nightwatch
programme.desc: Emergency medical technicians assist drug addicts and victims of assaults and accidents; police officers work to keep weapons off the streets.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Nightwatch
programme.desc: The NOLA EMS team celebrates the opening of its new headquarters; Titus, now an official paramedic, adjusts to new shared roles with his longtime partner, Dan; new teammates Arcady and Ted get to know each other's styles.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Nightwatch
programme.desc: With COVID-19 raging across the city, the New Orleans EMS responders face a series of crises that include a vehicle rollover from a police pursuit, a victim with close-range gunshot wounds, and a race to save a woman in respiratory distress.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Nightwatch
programme.sub-title: The End Is Just the Beginning
programme.desc: The New Orleans EMTs receive calls from every direction, from gunshot victims to seizures to a moped rider playing Pokemon Go.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Nightwatch
programme.desc: Police shoot a man; Tony and Dave treat a stabbing victim; Stokes and Mayville work to extinguish a grocery store fire.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Nightwatch
programme.desc: First responders in New Orleans battle freezing temperatures as they treat a driver who gets trapped after a serious car accident.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Nightwatch
programme.desc: Officers Roni and Cooper engage in a foot chase following a stabbing at a nightclub; Fire Rescue's Doug and Stokes try to save the life of a man shot in the throat; the hunt for a carjacker leads Will and Dimitri to the roof of an apartment complex.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Nightwatch
programme.desc: Tempers rise and violence swells during a hot, humid evening; police chase two armed carjacking suspects; Keeley tends to a family injured in a car accident; Titus and Dan respond to a call from a former Playboy Bunny.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Nightwatch
programme.desc: Emergency medical technicians Titus and Dan also act as therapists and counselors as they help steer troubled people back in the right direction.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Nightwatch
programme.desc: The first responders work to save the victims of several shootings and a drug overdose; police officers apprehend suspects in possession of illegal firearms.

programme.title: Nightwatch
programme.desc: The New Orleans EMT team treats a motorcycle accident victim in danger of losing a limb, multiple seizure sufferers, a young child with a breathing obstruction, and a perpetrator whose condition makes him a danger to himself and others.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: Air Service backs up Pierre and Jerry during a high-speed car chase through the streets of Tampa; Rush and Benny restrain a combative patient; Stokes and Doug transport a victim of sexual assault; a mother faces a heartbreaking decision.

programme.desc: Maksim Gelman embarks upon a 28-hour killing spree through New York City in February 2011, leaving four people dead and others injured.

programme.desc: A "push-button killer" who served time for stabbing a woman unleashes his hidden rage on a new girlfriend.

programme.title: The Killer Speaks
programme.sub-title: Gary Ray Bowles: The I-95 Killer
programme.desc: A drifter embarks on a spree of violent murders stretching from Maryland to Florida before he is finally apprehended in 1994.

programme.title: The Killer Speaks
programme.desc: Detectives in Great Falls, Mont., investigate the grisly stabbing death of a former corrections officer; the killer reveals his thoughts behind the crime.

programme.title: The Killer Speaks
programme.desc: Detectives hunt for person who shot a young man in Alamogordo, N.M, and left his body on a mountain trail; the killer recalls his crime and shares a shocking revelation about his past.

programme.title: The Killer Speaks
programme.desc: Investigators have no witnesses or evidence in a murder case until a career criminal in California makes a sudden confession that turns out to be less than truthful.
